command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_hermes.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop the failing loop first
systemctl --user stop hermes-agent

# Run hermes gateway install
cd /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway install 2>&1
echo install_exit=0

# Check what command gateway install created
cat /home/jose/.config/systemd/user/hermes-gateway.service 2>/dev/null || echo no_gateway_service
ls /home/jose/.config/systemd/user/
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_hermes.sh"
